dictionary.conversation_surface_budget_exceeded: Conversation output must be compressed to Pro Summary Compact.
dictionary.full_json_stdout_blocked: Full quality-gate JSON must be written to a file and summarized.
dictionary.artifact_pointer_required: Detailed evidence must be referenced by safe artifact path and hash.
dictionary.precision_parity_mismatch: Compact summary changed a merge or safety decision.
dictionary.raw_artifact_expansion_blocked: Expanded artifact content is not allowed in conversation.
dictionary.github_field_budget_exceeded: GitHub metadata query requested more fields than default budget.
dictionary.tee_full_json_blocked: Large JSON must not be piped through tee or Tee-Object.
